name: browser-pet-extension
description: Context-aware browser pet extension using clawd-pet SVGs.

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist assets && esbuild content.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js --format=iife --legal-comments=none && esbuild background.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/background.js --format=iife --legal-comments=none && esbuild popup/popup.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/popup/popup.js --format=iife --legal-comments=none && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp -r assets dist/ && mkdir -p dist/popup && cp popup/popup.html popup/popup.css dist/popup/
